text:
The World Tree Guide is a male tour guide who gives tours about the World Tree. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 147 (2011) 

Appearance

The World Tree Guide's appearance resembles that of a human Peggy though instead of a beard he has a mustache. He dresses in a dark-colored tunic with a light-colored and thick-lined trim and mustard-colored dress shirt. 

Personality

Though he originally is delighted to give Gon, Killua, and Alluka an explanation about the World Tree, he becomes hurt when they ignore him. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Gon, Killua, and Alluka acquire his services once they reach the city that's home to the World Tree. He enthusiastically starts telling them about the history and dimensions of the World Tree, but the more he tells them, the more they get distracted and they eventually end up ignoring him, which makes him leave in tears. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The World Tree Guide is an 2011 anime adaptation only character.
The character also greatly resembles a human version and sounds exactly like the Chimera Ant Peggy in the Japanese dub.

Miscellaneous

He shares the same voice actors with Peggy, Puhat, Botobai Gigante, Loupe Higland and the narrator.
